User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the IDGenius application, including their personal information and Star balance for the monetization system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and notifications.

currentStarsBalance.description: The current number of Stars available for the user to spend.

totalStarsEarned.description: The cumulative total of Stars the user has earned through free actions.

totalStarsPurchased.description: The cumulative total of Stars the user has acquired through purchases.

totalStarsUsed.description: The cumulative total of Stars the user has spent on premium features.

lastLoginTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the user's last successful login, used for calculating login streaks.

consecutiveLoginDays.description: The number of consecutive days the user has logged in, used for awarding streak bonuses.

referralCode.description: A unique code assigned to the user, which can be shared to refer new users.

referredByUserId.description: Reference to the User who referred this user to the application. (Relationship: User 1:N User)

isProfileComplete.description: Indicates whether the user has completed all required profile information, a condition for earning Stars.

StarTransaction.title: StarTransaction
StarTransaction.description: Records every instance where a user's Star balance changes, detailing gains, purchases, and expenditures.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StarTransaction entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User involved in this transaction. (Relationship: User 1:N StarTransaction)

type.description: The category of the transaction: 'purchase' (Stars bought), 'earned' (Stars obtained freely), or 'spent' (Stars consumed for features).

starsChange.description: The amount of Stars changed by this transaction (positive for gains/purchases, negative for expenditures).

balanceAfterTransaction.description: The user's Star balance immediately after this transaction occurred.

description.description: A human-readable description of the transaction (e.g., 'Purchased Standard Star Pack', 'Earned for referring a friend', 'Spent 5 stars on Premium Photo AI Enhancement').

timestamp.description: The date and time when the transaction took place.

relatedObjectId.description: Optional: Reference to the ID of an associated entity (e.g., StarPackage ID if purchased, GeneratedID if stars were spent on an ID creation). Leave null if not applicable.

relatedObjectType.description: Optional: Indicates the type of the 'relatedObjectId' (e.g., 'StarPackage', 'GeneratedID', 'StarEarningActionType', 'StarSpendingFeatureType'). Leave null if not applicable.

AdvertVideo.title: AdvertVideo
AdvertVideo.description: Represents an advertisement video that users can watch to earn stars.

AppNavigationSettings.title: AppNavigationSettings
AppNavigationSettings.description: Controls the visibility of navigation items in the app.

definition.description: Stores user profiles and their cumulative star statistics.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.
